'''Gintish''' was a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] student at the [[Syndic Mitth'raw'nuruodo training academy]]. Gintish was assigned to pump the oxygen out of the outer corridors of the base during the [[Battle of Rhigar|attack]] on the academy.

==Appearances==
*{{GamerCite|7|Red Sky, Blue Flame}} {{1st}}
